seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dutton and East Moonta. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dutton vs East Moonta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dutton and East Moonta.
heading: Dutton vs East Moonta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dutton, South Australia and East Moonta, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dutton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to East Moonta (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dutton or East Moonta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dutton has a flood risk score of 24/100, while East Moonta scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dutton scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. East Moonta scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dutton or East Moonta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dutton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
